headline: Assessing Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: What recent performance tells you about Fidelity National Information Services Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) has been under pressure, with the stock showing a 0.2% decline over the past day, a 7.8% decline over the month, and a 23.0% decline over the past 3 months. Over longer periods, the pattern continues, with a 22.3% negative return year to date and a 26.7% negative total return over the past year, along with a 59.7% negative total return over five years. See our latest...

headline: Fidelity National Information Services Bets On AI To Reinforce Insurance Risk Story
summary: Fidelity National Information Services, NYSE:FIS, has introduced the Insurance Risk Suite AI Assistant, a generative AI tool for insurance risk modeling. The new assistant is designed to support actuaries and risk teams with real time guidance on model building, particularly around climate and cyber risk. The launch reflects FIS’s push into AI driven financial technology solutions for insurers. NYSE:FIS is rolling out this product at a time when its share price stands at $50.96 and recent...

headline: RBC Capital Reduces Target Price on Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) to $69 on Slight Q4 Earnings Miss
summary: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. (NYSE:FIS) is one of the 14 Most Undervalued NYSE Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. RBC Capital, on February 25, reduced its target price on Fidelity National Information Services by 19.8% to $69 (from $86) but retained the firm’s Outperform call on the stock.
